headline: 1 Profitable Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Question
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

headline: GE Aerospace vs. Textron: Which Aerospace & Defense Stock Should You Bet On?
summary: GE outpaces TXT with stronger growth, rising estimates and major engine wins, despite trading at a higher valuation multiple.
